zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Walton於大約1190年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾沃爾頓時，他的父親Herbert de Walton24歲，母親Mrs. Margaret De Walton of Hereford24歲。他和Elizabeth Hance至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1250年4月10日在英國英格蘭享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Walton于大约1190年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾沃爾頓时，他的父亲Herbert de Walton24岁，母亲Mrs. Margaret De Walton of Hereford24岁。他和Elizabeth Hance至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1250年4月10日在英国英格兰享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Walton, which are named with Old English walh ‘foreigner, Briton, serf’ (genitive plural wala), wald ‘woodland’, wall ‘wall’, or wælla ‘well, spring, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

History: George Walton (1741–1804) signed the Declaration of Independence. He was born in Prince Edward County, VA, whither his grandfather had emigrated from England in 1682. He moved to Savannah, GA, and became governor of GA and a prominent jurist.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Walton was born about 1190, in Walton, Leicestershire, England, his father, Herbert de Walton, was 24 and his mother, Mrs. Margaret De Walton of Hereford, was 24. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Elizabeth Hance. He died on 10 April 1250, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Walton est né environ 1190, à Walton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Herbert de Walton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Margaret De Walton of Hereford, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Elizabeth Hance. Il est décédé le 10 avril 1250, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Walton um 1190 in Walton, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Herbert de Walton 24 und seine Mutter Mrs. Margaret De Walton of Hereford 24. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Hance mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. April 1250 im Alter von 61 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Walton è nato il circa 1190 nel Walton, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Herbert de Walton, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Margaret De Walton of Hereford, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Elizabeth Hance. Morì il 10 aprile 1250, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William de Walton(이)가 대략 1190년 영국 레이스스터실르 월턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herbert de Walton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Margaret De Walton of Hereford(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Hance(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 4월 10일 영국 잉글랜드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Walton родился около 1190 г. в местности валтон, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Herbert de Walton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Margaret De Walton of Hereford, 24. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Elizabeth Hance. Он умер 10 апреля 1250 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.
